title: Luxury Chalets with Private Pools | Kozara Panoramic Resort
logo_text: Kozara Panoramic Resort: Secluded Mountain Retreat
subtitle: Kozara Panoramic Resort – peaceful nature escape near Banja Luka & Croatia
intro_title:
Not Just an Escape,
A Discovery.
intro_subtitle: Nestled in the heart of Mount Kozara, our resort offers an unforgettable experience where every detail reflects warmth, care, and elegance.
offer_title:
Limited availability – only 5 chalets
Early booking recommended
offer_desc: Prices have been temporarily reduced because final exterior landscaping and finishing touches are still in progress. During this winter season, the private outdoor swimming pools are naturally closed and will reopen in warmer weather. The sauna and relax area are scheduled to be completed soon.
offer_notice_desc: Prices shown below are introductory and subject to revision as the resort transitions from opening phase to full operations. Rates may be adjusted based on demand, availability, and completion of remaining works.
retreat-title: Discover a unique boutique resort in the mountains of Kozara
retreat-lead:
Experience five private luxury chalets, each thoughtfully designed with its own swimming pool and panoramic mountain views.

Perfect for couples, families, and guests looking to escape the noise of the city and reconnect with nature.
chalet_features:
• Up to 6 guests
  • Private pool (heated option available)
  • Large terrace with views
  • Modern bathroom & kitchen
chalets_desc: Each chalet at Kozara Panoramic Resort offers a unique blend of comfort and nature. Enjoy underfloor heating, air conditioning, a fully equipped kitchen, and premium bedding.
wind_desc: The Wind chalet carries the freshness of the mountain breeze and the feeling of freedom in every breath. Perfect for those who wish to feel the rhythm of nature and the harmony between wind and trees.
summit_desc: The Sun chalet glows with golden light, perfect for mornings filled with warmth and energy. Every ray of sunshine brings joy and reminds you that each day is a new beginning.
star_desc: The Star chalet lies beneath a sky full of stars, where nights turn into magical moments. It’s ideal for couples or anyone wishing to find calmness under the endless sparkle of the night sky.
cloud_desc: The Cloud chalet floats above the clouds, surrounded by silence and a view that connects sky and earth. It’s made for those who seek inspiration and peace in moments of pure stillness.
sky_desc: The Sky chalet stands at the boundary where the world fades and the heavens begin, offering boundless horizons and a sense of absolute freedom. It is the perfect vantage point for seekers of clarity, allowing you to breathe in the vastness and connect with the world's grand scale.
location_description: 45-65 km from Banja Luka (depending on route) • 165 km from Zagreb • 260-280 km from Sarajevo (depending on route) • 310-350 km from Belgrade (depending on route)
location_hint: Or find us on the map below
about_us_title: Our Story: Luxury and Peace in Perfect Harmony
about_us_h3: The Mission of Kozara Panoramic Resort
about_us_desc1: Kozara Panoramic Resort was born from a passion for untouched nature and the vision that premium luxury accommodation can exist in total harmony with the environment. Our mission is to provide a secluded mountain retreat where guests find a deep balance between comfort and serenity.
about_us_desc2: Nestled in the lush landscapes of Northern Bosnia, our resort offers an unforgettable boutique experience. Our modern private chalets provide complete intimacy while offering all the high-end amenities of a luxury villa, including private heated pools and underfloor heating. At Kozara Panoramic Resort, time slows down, allowing you to reconnect with nature in an elegant, tranquil setting near Gradiška and Banja Luka.
about_kozara_h31: The "Air Spa" and Green Jewel of Krajina
about_kozara_desc1: Mount Kozara, famously known as the “air spa” of the Balkans, is a unique destination where the air is exceptionally pure. As the green jewel of Western Krajina, it offers a natural health retreat perfect for spiritual renewal and physical recovery. Its dense pine forests and crystal-clear mountain streams create an oxygen-rich microclimate that is rare in today’s world.
about_kozara_desc2: Kozara is more than just a destination; it is an experience of freedom, making it the perfect nature escape near Banja Luka for adventurers and families alike.
about_kozara_desc3: Kozara is much more than just a destination; it's an experience of freedom, making it the perfect nature escape near Banja Luka for adventurers and families.
closing_desc: Book your stay today and discover the magic of Mount Kozara.
booking_form_occupants_note: Up to 6 Adults, or 4 Adults and 2 Children
faq_heating_q: Are the chalets heated and air-conditioned?
faq_heating_a: Yes. All chalets feature fully automated air conditioning and heating for year-round comfort, including underfloor heating in the living area, dining area, kitchen, and bathroom.
faq_kitchen_q: What is included in the kitchen?
faq_kitchen_a: The kitchens are fully equipped for self-catering. Features include a hob, large oven, microwave, large fridge-freezer, dishwasher, cookware, dishes, and glassware.
faq_linens_q: Do I need to bring my own bedding or towels?
faq_linens_a: No. All bedding and towels are provided. Bathrobes and swimming pool towels are available upon request.
faq_wifi_a: Yes, Wi-Fi access is provided. The network name and password will be given to you at check-in.
faq_pool_heating_q: Are the pools private and heated?
faq_pool_heating_a: Yes, each chalet has its private pool (seasonal opening times).
faq_lifeguard_q: Is there a lifeguard at the pool?
faq_lifeguard_a: No. Pool use is entirely at your own risk. Parents must supervise children at all times. Please note that only plastic glasses are allowed in the pool area.
faq_checkin_q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq_checkin_a:
Check-in: 14:00 – 22:00.
Check-out: By 10:00.
Note: Early check-in or late check-out may be possible depending on availability; please contact reception in advance.
faq_deposit_a: Yes. A €250 credit card deposit is pre-authorized at check-in. This is a temporary hold to cover damages or unpaid extras and is released a few days after check-out if no issues are reported.
faq_cancel_a:
Standard Season (April–June, Mid-Sept–Oct): 25% refund >14 days before arrival; 50% refund 7–13 days before. No refund if <7 days.
Peak Season (July, August, Holidays): No cancellations or refund available
faq_payment_a: We accept Visa, Mastercard, and American Express. Tourist tax is added to the booking. Extras can be paid by cash or card at check-out.
faq_tax_a:
Yes, a tourist tax is charged per person, per night. The rates are as follows:
Adults: €1.30 per night.
Children (12 to 18 years): €0.80 per night.
Children (under 12 years): Free of charge.
faq_shops_q: Where are the nearest shops and restaurants?
faq_shops_a:
Turjak (approx. 4 km): Nearest grocery store, restaurants, and cafés.
Gradiška (approx. 20 km): Larger supermarkets, pharmacies, and main highway connections.
faq_housekeeping_a: Could be provided for stays longer than 7 days.
faq_baby_a: No. We do not provide baby cots or highchairs, so we strongly advise parents to bring their own equipment for their children.
faq_pets_a: Yes, pets are allowed upon request. Please note there is an additional fee of €15 per stay.
faq_parking_a: Yes, there is free private parking directly next to each chalet.
faq_ev_q: Do you have an EV charging station?
faq_ev_a: Not currently, though one is planned for the future. The nearest petrol station is on the main road to Gradiška (approx. 18 km).
faq_quiet_a: Quiet hours are from 22:00 to 08:00. (Exceptions may be made if one group has booked all 5 chalets).
faq_airport_q: What are the transport options for arriving by air?
faq_airport_a: We can arrange private transfers to and from Banja Luka (45 min), Zagreb (1.5h), and Belgrade (4h). Local taxis are also available. Please contact us in advance to schedule your service.
faq_yearround_q: Is the resort open all year-round?
faq_find_q: How do I find the Resort?
faq_find_a: Please follow our sign posts for Kozara Panoramic Resort.
impressum-address: Registered address: Selo Kozara BB, Gradiška, 78400 Gradiška
terms-reservation: A reservation is confirmed when the guest receives written confirmation via email or messaging apps.
terms-early-check: Early check-in or late check-out is possible depending on availability.
terms-cancellation-standard: Standard Season (April--June, Mid-Sept--Oct): 25% refund >14 days before arrival; 50% refund 7-13 days before. No refund if <7 days.
terms-cancellation-peak: Peak Season (July, August, Holidays): No cancellations or refund available.
terms-behaviour: Non-compliance with the established house rules may lead to the immediate cancellation of the accommodation.
terms-guests: Guests are responsible for any damage caused to the chalet, interior, furniture, equipment, or outdoor areas. Deposit of a €250 required at check in.
terms-rights: PEVA d.o.o. reserves the right to charge repair or replacement costs.

terms-pool-risk: Pool use is entirely at the guest's own risk.
terms-pool-children: Children must be supervised at all times.
terms-pool-glass: No glass items near the pool.
terms-pool-risk2: Guests use the private pool entirely at their own risk.
terms-pool-supervision: Children must be supervised at all times.
terms-pool-injuries: PEVA d.o.o. is not liable for injuries resulting from improper use of the pool area.
terms-smoking-prohibited: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the chalets.
terms-pets-allowed: Pets allowed at a €15.00 per pet and stay.
terms-room3: 2 single beds in gallery or sofa bed options
privacy-data: PEVA d.o.o. collects and processes personal data only for:
privacy-data-collected: Data collected: name, address, phone, email, ID/passport information (required by law).
privacy-data-personal: Personal data is stored securely and not shared with third parties except:
privacy-data-deletion: Guests may request deletion of their data after their stay, except where data must be retained for legal obligations.
cookies-notice1: This website uses cookies for basic functionality and analytics.
cookies-notice2: By continuing to browse, you agree to the use of cookies.
price-transparency1: All prices shown exclude tourist tax (as stated at booking).
price-transparency2: Heating, electricity, pools, towels, and Wi-Fi are included in the price.
meta_content: Book Your Chalet at Kozara Panoramic Resort
meta_content2: Discover luxury mountain chalets with private heated pools near Banja Luka. Enjoy untouched nature, panoramic views, and 5-star comfort. Book your Kozara escape today.

exp-text1: Wake up to birdsong, enjoy your private pool, and watch the sunset over rolling hills.
exp-text2: At night, experience complete silence and a sky full of stars — something rare in today’s world.
strategic-location-info-p: Located in the beautiful Kozara region, near Gradiška and Banja Luka, close to the Croatian border.
strategic-location-target: Ideal for guests from Germany, Austria, Slovenia, and Serbia looking for a luxury nature retreat.

alt_carousel_1: Snow-covered landscape at sunrise with pastel skies. A path leads through deep snow towards a structure on the right. Calm, serene winter morning scene.

alt_carousel_3: A wooden house dusted with snow sits among bare trees on a snowy hillside, under a calm, pale blue sky, conveying a serene winter scene.
alt_carousel_4: Snow-covered trees and a wooden cabin on a hill are bathed in soft winter light. The scene is serene and peaceful, evoking a sense of calm.
alt_carousel_5: Snow-covered trees in the foreground with two rustic houses in the background. The scene conveys a serene winter atmosphere under a clear sky.
alt_carousel_6: Snow-covered hillside at sunrise, with leafless trees casting shadows. The sky is clear and blue, creating a serene and peaceful winter landscape.

alt_carousel_9: A snowy landscape featuring several wooden cabins situated on a hill, surrounded by trees covered in snow. The sky is clear and blue.
alt_carousel_10: Snow-covered evergreen tree in foreground with a backdrop of rolling, snowy hills and distant misty mountains under a clear, bright sky. Winter serenity.

alt_carousel_13: A snow-covered landscape with hills and trees in the background, viewed from a snowy ledge.
alt_carousel_14: A panoramic view of a snowy landscape, showcasing rolling hills and fields blanketed in snow under a clear blue sky.
alt_carousel_15: A wooden cabin blanketed in snow sits on a quiet hilltop under a clear blue sky, overlooking a vast, tranquil winter landscape of rolling hills.
alt_carousel_16: A winter landscape covered in snow, with mountains and a cloudy sky in the background. Trees are frosted with snow, creating a serene and picturesque scene.
